first_2_records.notes: Extracted only explicit environmental concentration values from the provided OCR text. Records include explicit sample-level totals/components, quantified compiled raw-water maxima from Table 2, one treated-water utility sample from Table 3, and explicitly readable second-campaign treated-water ranges/maxima.
